GaneshaGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_11_Payout3_1: Bet ways win if the winning symbols are in succession from the leftmost reel to right.
GaneshaGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_12_Payout3_2: Total number of winning bet ways for each symbol are calculated by multiplying the number of adjacent winning symbols on each symbols from leftmost reel to right.
GaneshaGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_13_Payout3_3: The winning symbol payout is multiplied by the number of winning bet ways.
GaneshaGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout1_1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
GaneshaGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_17_Payout1_2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.
GaneshaGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: 3, 4 or 5 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 12, 15 or 20 free spins respectively.
GaneshaGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, all wins will be multiplied by x2.
GaneshaGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: Any Wild symbol appearing on the reels will be collected.
GaneshaGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_4_Payout2_4: If 3 Wild symbols have been collected, the multiplier will be increased by 2 and the Wild symbol collection will reset to zero.
GaneshaGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_5_Payout2_5: The maximum multiplier value achievable is x20.

GaneshaGoldRules.Rule1_1: Ganesha Gold is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring Free Spins Feature with win multipliers up to x20.

Rule1_2.value: The game is played with 30 base bet for 243 ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule1_2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
Rule1_2.example: The game is played with 30 base bet for 243 ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

GaneshaGoldRules.Rule1_14: Simultaneous wins on different bet ways are added.
GaneshaGoldRules.Rule1_18: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
GaneshaGoldRules.Rule2_6: Scatter symbol does not appear during Free Spins Feature.
